---
title: "Germán Pupato"
pagetitle: "Germán Pupato — Associate Professor of Economics, Toronto Metropolitan University"
page-layout: article
image: files/toronto-skyline.jpg
---

::: {.column-screen}
<img src="files/toronto-skyline.jpg" alt="Panoramic view of the Toronto skyline" class="hero-img" />
:::

::: {.hero-attribution-wrap}
[Photo: [Francisco Diez](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Panorama_skyline_Toronto_2010.jpg) · [CC BY 2.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/)]{.hero-attribution}
:::

::: {.content-card}
# Germán Pupato

::: {.profile-card}
<img src="files/profile.jpg" alt="Germán Pupato" class="profile-img" />

::: {.profile-text}
Associate Professor, Department of Economics\
[Toronto Metropolitan University](https://www.torontomu.ca/economics/)

I study international trade and spatial economics — how transportation markets, skill heterogeneity, and labor market frictions shape comparative advantage and the gains from trade.
:::

:::

## Contact

::: {.contact-block}
**Email:**&nbsp;[gpupato@torontomu.ca](mailto:gpupato@torontomu.ca)\
**Office:**&nbsp;JOR-217\
**Phone:**&nbsp;(416) 979-5000 ext. 3143\
**Mail:**&nbsp;Department of Economics, Toronto Metropolitan University, 350 Victoria St., Toronto, ON M5B 2K3, Canada\
**ORCID:**&nbsp;[0009-0002-6444-5327](https://orcid.org/0009-0002-6444-5327)
:::

:::

```{=html}
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Person",
  "name": "Germán Pupato",
  "givenName": "Germán",
  "familyName": "Pupato",
  "jobTitle": "Associate Professor of Economics",
  "affiliation": {
    "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
    "name": "Toronto Metropolitan University",
    "url": "https://www.torontomu.ca/economics/"
  },
  "worksFor": {
    "@type": "CollegeOrUniversity",
    "name": "Toronto Metropolitan University"
  },
  "url": "https://gpupato.github.io",
  "email": "mailto:gpupato@torontomu.ca",
  "knowsAbout": [
    "International Trade",
    "Spatial Economics",
    "Comparative Advantage",
    "Transportation Markets"
  ],
  "sameAs": [
    "https://orcid.org/0009-0002-6444-5327"
  ]
}
</script>
```
